title: Science report paragraph
text: The experiment was conducted at 25 degrees Celsius using a 100 ml sample. After 30 minutes, the reaction reached equilibrium with a pH of 7.4. Three trials confirmed the result, with a standard deviation of 0.08.

tips.target: The experiment was conducted at 25 degrees Celsius using a 100 ml sample. After 30 minutes, the reaction
reached equilibrium with a pH of 7.4. Three trials confirmed the result, with a standard deviation of 0.08.

character_tips.maxim: Lab reports test mixed-content speed under accuracy.
character_tips.klavochka: Sharing what experiments reveal, my dear 🔬
